task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Lenovo ThinkPad X1 Carbon (Electronics). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $1619.00 and wholesale is $1133.00. Product features: Business laptop with Intel Core i7 and 14" WUXGA display. Reference: https://www.lenovo.com/us/en/p/laptops/thinkpad/thinkpadx1/x1-carbon-gen-10/

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Lenovo ThinkPad X1 Carbon. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Lenovo ThinkPad X1 Carbon. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
